{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-03-12.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-11 -> 2026-03-12)

- "What Iranian island will Donald Trump say US forces bombed military installations on by March 14, 2026?"

- "What ship will be named as carrying about 3,500 US military personnel to the Middle East by March 31, 2026?"

- "Which southern Lebanese village will be identified by March 14, 2026, as the site of an Israeli strike on a health centre that kills 12 medical workers?"

- "Which team will remain alive through a Women’s World Cup qualifying playoff after losing the AFC Women’s Asian Cup quarterfinal on March 13, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {South Korea: 0.15, Vietnam: 0.15, Philippines: 0.12, China: 0.08} | Truth: North Korea
  Brier: -0.07 | TW-Score: -6.58

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 330 (270 resolved, 60 active)
- accuracy: 23.9% | brier skill score: 0.130 | time weighted score: 4019.53
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
